action.description: Operation to run. Use zip to create an archive or unzip to extract one.

source_path.description: File or folder to archive when action=zip.

archive_path.description: ZIP archive to extract when action=unzip.

include_timestamp.description: Append YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS to archive filename before .zip when creating archives.

overwrite.description: Allow overwriting an existing archive or extracted file.

exclude_patterns.description: Glob-style patterns to exclude when zipping.

include_hidden.description: Include hidden files and folders when action=zip.

root_folder_mode.description: Preserve top-level folder name in the archive or archive only its contents.

safe_extract.description: Block path traversal and unsafe extraction paths when action=unzip.

flatten_single_root.description: If the ZIP contains one top-level folder, flatten it into extract_to after extraction.
